changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS documents_seq START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Sequence для генерации уникальных номеров документов (DOC-YEAR-XXXXX)
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS document_number_seq START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS document_history_seq START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS approval_registry_seq START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1
